_comment: Default YouTube video IDs per module. Each entry has a 'default_video_id' that plays immediately, plus optional 'playlist_id' for a full playlist. Update video IDs here to change what plays. All videos are from trusted educational channels (AMAZE, WHO, UNICEF, etc.).
